title: Oorukku Therkittu Song Lyrics Kummi Paatu
stanzas: <div>Oorukku Therkittu Song Lyrics Kummi Paatu

oorukku therkittu
othaala maram
angaala nikkuraa raasammaa
angaala nikkuraa raasammaa

yaarukum sollaama
maamanum vaaraandi
mayangi sokkuraa paarammaa
mayangi sokkuraa paarammaa

oorukku therkittu
othaala maram
angaala nikkuraa raasammaa

yaarukum sollaama
maamanum vaaraandi
mayangi sokkuraa paarammaa

iluththu kindura
kaeppa kali pola
manasa kinduthu thannaala

ada iruttukullaara
pesura sangathi
inga nelavuthu munnaala

ada pongura pongura
aasaiyila ponnu
nikkuraa nikkuraa yaekkathula

ada konjura konjura
nokkathula maaman
suthuraan suthuraan vegathula

Ettu gaja seela thaanaa
iranguthu keela.
katti vacha veliellaam
velagum thannaala

vittu vittu kaaichal
lesaa adipathu pola
ettu vachi naan nadanthaa
mayakkam unnaala

ada suthura suthura
vandu paadum saththam
poovukku ketkudhu munnaala

adi kaththuna kaththuna
kadhal kili saththam
kaadhula kaetkum thannaala

ada ennaa eppudi solla
ennamo ennamo
nadanthu pochu

kulicha maelu thavandu
pochu marubadi kulikka
ada kodhicha kovam
adangi pochu
athanai nenachaa

oorukku therkittu
othaala maram
angaala nikkuraa raasammaa

yaarukum sollaama
maamanum vaaraandi
mayangi sokkuraa paarammaa

iluththu kindura
kaeppa kali pola
manasa kinduthu thannaala

ada iruttukullaara
pesura sangathi
inga nelavuthu munnaala

ada pongura pongura
aasaiyila ponnu
nikkuraa nikkuraa yaekkathula

ada konjura konjura
nokkathula maaman
suthuraan suthuraan vegathula

Kaattu poovu vaasam
veesi sirichathanaala
kaathu pattu saaiyuthamma
kaanja maram pola.

oothukulla meeri
thaanaa oorum thanni pola
yaethukitta rendu manasum
pongi varum mela

ada vetkamum vegamum
serndhukittu ponna
thinguthu thinguthu unnaala

adi akkamum pakkamum
paakka solli inga
aasaiyum meerudhu unnaala

ada ... poduthu yamma
vasayum nenappum
kattupada villa

akka porutha maamanukku
aara porukkaladi
adi saera thudikkum
aambaliku aasa koraiyaladi

oorukku therkittu
othaala maram
angaala nikkuraa raasammaa

yaarukum sollaama
maamanum vaaraandi
mayangi sokkuraa paarammaa

iluththu kindura
kaeppa kali pola
manasa kinduthu thannaala

ada iruttukullaara
pesura sangathi
inga nelavuthu munnaala

ada pongura pongura
aasaiyila ponnu
nikkuraa nikkuraa yaekkathula

ada konjura konjura
nokkathula maaman
suthuraan suthuraan vegathula

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Oorukku Therkittu celebrates community and togetherness, reflecting the joy of gatherings and festivities.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is part of the Kummi Paattu genre, which is traditionally performed during celebrations, but the specific movie is unknown.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Arunmozhi and Swarnalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oorukku Therkittu was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on May 21, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Oorukku Therkittu is a lively folk tune that embodies the spirit of community celebrations. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and happiness, making it a perfect choice for festive occasions. The catchy lyrics and upbeat melody invite listeners to join in the joy of togetherness. This track not only showcases the rich cultural heritage of Tamil Nadu but also highlights the collaborative brilliance of its talented artists.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oorukku Therkittu is a vibrant folk melody that captures the essence of Tamil culture and celebration. With its catchy rhythms and lively lyrics, this song is a perfect representation of the joyous spirit found in Kummi Paattu. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a timeless favorite among music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The tree stands tall in the village, it is rooted there, Raasammaa, it is rooted there, Raasammaa.
Without telling anyone, the uncle has come, feeling dizzy, look at this, feeling dizzy, look at this.
The tree stands tall in the village, it is rooted there, Raasammaa.
Without telling anyone, the uncle has come, feeling dizzy, look at this, feeling dizzy, look at this.
Like a playful child, the mind is restless on its own.
The talk happening in the darkness is coming from here, it was there before.
In the desire to bloom, the girl stands there, standing there, in the call.
In a little glance, the uncle is moving quickly, moving quickly with speed.
Eight elephants are coming down. Everything that is tied will shine on its own.
Letting go feels like a light burden, as I walk with you, I am lost in a dream.
The sound that comes when it spins is heard by the flower before it blooms.
The sound of love is heard in the heart when it is tied up.
How do I say this? Something is happening, something is happening, it has passed by.
After bathing, the anger has calmed down, thinking of all that.
The tree stands tall in the village, it is rooted there, Raasammaa.
Without telling anyone, the uncle has come, feeling dizzy, look at this, feeling dizzy, look at this.
Like a playful child, the mind is restless on its own.
The talk happening in the darkness is coming from here, it was there before.
In the desire to bloom, the girl stands there, standing there, in the call.
In a little glance, the uncle is moving quickly, moving quickly with speed.
The fragrant flower is smiling in the breeze, the breeze is blowing, like a tree.
In the village, like water, two minds will come together.
The fear and speed have come together, it is all because of you.
The desire and closeness are being expressed here, it is all because of you.
Let it go, let it go, the mind and the heart are not tied together.
The sister is suitable for the uncle, it is a matter of competition, it will start to bloom for the girl.
The tree stands tall in the village, it is rooted there, Raasammaa.
Without telling anyone, the uncle has come, feeling dizzy, look at this, feeling dizzy, look at this.

In the desire to bloom, the girl stands there, standing there, in the call.
In a little glance, the uncle is moving quickly, moving quickly with speed.
